steps.heading: Mission
steps.body_markdown: Our mission is to simplify complex workflows with **intelligent automation** that scales across teams.

steps.heading: Customer Pain
steps.body_markdown:
Teams spend excessive time on manual coordination, causing delays and high operational costs.

This creates a clear opener for automation and visibility tools.

steps.heading: Why Now
steps.body_markdown: Rapid adoption of cloud platforms and AI-driven tooling makes automation both feasible and expected by customers.

slides.title: Growth Strategy
slides.subtitle: How we acquire and retain customers

steps.heading: Target Segments
steps.body_markdown: Mid-market technology, finance, and logistics teams that manage high-volume operational workflows.

steps.heading: Acquisition Channels
steps.body_markdown:
**Inbound content & SEO**, targeted paid campaigns, and channel partnerships.

Pilot programs with strategic customers to build case studies.

steps.heading: Monetization
steps.body_markdown: Subscription tiers with usage-based metering and an enterprise plan for integrations and SSO.

steps.heading: Retention
steps.body_markdown: Strong onboarding, in-product analytics, and a customer success program to drive expansion.

steps.heading: Stability & Scale
steps.body_markdown: Migrate core services to resilient, horizontally-scalable microservices and add observability.

steps.heading: Performance
steps.body_markdown: Optimize API latency, introduce edge caching, and implement async processing for heavy jobs.

steps.heading: Security & Compliance
steps.body_markdown: Harden encryption-at-rest/in-transit, complete SOC 2 readiness, and add role-based access controls.

steps.heading: Product Innovation
steps.body_markdown: Ship AI-assisted automation builders and expand the public API for integrators.
